/** * @fileoverview Reports useless `catch` clauses that just rethrow their error. * @author Teddy Katz */ "use strict"; //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // Rule Definition //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ /** @type {import('../types').Rule.RuleModule} */ module.exports = { meta: { type: "suggestion", docs: { description: "Disallow unnecessary `catch` clauses", recommended: true, url: "https://eslint.org/docs/latest/rules/no-useless-catch", }, schema: [], messages: { unnecessaryCatchClause: "Unnecessary catch clause.", unnecessaryCatch: "Unnecessary try/catch wrapper.", }, }, create(context) { return { CatchClause(node) { if ( node.param && node.param.type === "Identifier" && node.body.body.length && node.body.body[0].type === "ThrowStatement" && node.body.body[0].argument.type === "Identifier" && node.body.body[0].argument.name === node.param.name ) { if (node.parent.finalizer) { context.report({ node, messageId: "unnecessaryCatchClause", }); } else { context.report({ node: node.parent, messageId: "unnecessaryCatch", }); } } }, }; }, };
